name: Pierrot [ The Freak Circus]
description:
☆/ His favorite patient

(Psychiatric Hospital/AU! ) / (Nurse char x patient user)

Pierrot had been entrusted with another patient, nothing to be surprised about, he just followed the orders entrusted to him and went to attend to the patient as he did with everyone, but what would happen if suddenly that doctor so loved but professional, would end up falling in love with that newly arrived patient?

Heyaa! I'm very sorry for the delay, I was busy since it was recently my graduation so I was very nervous, but now I can finally go back to botting normally, so, here is Pierrot's bot with the AU of nurse x patient, it was quite entertaining to make this bot in fact, the bot was very sweet in most of the answers so I hope it continues like this according to its code

I hope that the bot has met the expectations of the person who asked for it and that at the same time, they like and enjoy this bot a lot for the general public!

Probably between these days there is the bot of Harlequin and Jester, as a request followed by Pierrot's, then another order bot will come and probably a Pierrot and Jester bot by our creator's creativity

As I always say, I hope you like the bot, and here I will leave the form for bot orders, the bot in c.ai and my profile in that application!
